item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:duty","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering narrows duty to a paid-work task and does not clearly make this person's leaving it undone the wrong; add that linkage and cover duties of position or narrow the gloss."}
